transcript.text:
[No food today?]
Hello, this is Tzuyang
Today, I wanted to relay a message of thankfulness instead of mukbang
We just hit 4 million subscribers on this channel
I thank you all so much
Really.. Always Really. Always very much
I always really appreciate the support
I know that it's a blessing to have a job that I enjoy
Since I truly love eating
And I always keep in mind that it's very rare and valuable to receive all this attention and support
I'm really nothing on my own
No matter how much I upload,
No matter how well I eat, how much I eat,
If it wasn't for my viewers, I really am nothing
That's why I think of all of you very dearly
Words cannot express my thankfulness

So from now, I will try my best to give back the love that I receive
And always provide with great content
I want to thank everyone once again
[Thank you so much!!!]
Lastly, I was thinking about what I should do to celebrate 4 mil
I really wanted to meet with my subscribers,
But it's not possible with covid
So I prepared some small gifts for my subscribers
It's not much, but
I prepared them with a genuine heart of thankfulness
It's nothing big, but please enjoy the video and see what it is!
[I am truly grateful for the undeserved love from my dear subscribers, I will always come back with more delicious and heartwarming videos. Thank you from the bottom of my heart] -Tzuyang
[Where is Tzuyang at today?]
[Gyeonggi Province, City of Yeoju]
It's so hot today!
Hello

[A sudden round of applause]
Congrats on 4 mil Thank you
Live long and healthy
4 million subscribers!
Even a hanging banner
Thank you
[Is this all for Tzuyang?]
[Not really]
[This is Korea's very first smart-farm for & by people with disabilities]
[Purme Social Farm]
[A farm designed to help people with learning disabilities to socialize]
In a way to celebrate Tzuyang's 4 million subscribers,
She purchased 400 boxes of produce from our farm
Thanks to that, we are able to create more jobs for our people with learning disabilities
Thank you so much
It gets very tiring at first

But it gets better I think?
A pretty hat!
Thank you
Sleeves, gloves, and a towel!
Let's go pick some tomatoes!
[Easily picked cherry tomatoes]
For how long have you worked here?
Tomato...
I don't know!
Don't be too nervous
How old are you?
20 years old?
[Oops]
[Let's see]
I have more
Did we start at the same time?

No way, I better start working fast
Well, it's because I was picking the ones at the top!
Since we're working with Tzuyang right now,
[I'm very happy!]
[A greenhouse hotter than 40 degrees Celsius (104 Fahrenheit)]
[Continues to pick tomatoes]
[Professional]
This is no joke
[Feeling hotter and hotter]
[But still working hard for the subscribers]
I like it
What do you like? (Me?!)
I like tomatoes!
Tomatoes? Yes!
[It's eco-friendly!]
[Still picking tomatoes]

[To the rescue]
Drink some of this
Thank you!
She can film a drinking ad
[To the owner of Toreta drinking company:]
[How about me?]
[I'm going all in]
[Everyone competing to be an advertisement model]
[Gives up because of the heat]
Thank you Is this for me to eat?
Yes, you can eat it
We don't use pesticides You can eat it right away
[Taste-testing on the spot is the best!]
Delicious!
[Whatever, I'm drinking Toreta]
Ms. Tzuyang, aren't you tired?

I'm fine
Okay good
You're good at working
Why don't you apply here full time?
That's one way
[A life contract perhaps?]
Since she's so good
No interview needed Bring the papers
[Let's finish it up]
[Passionate]
[A little too overboard]
Where?
Here on the floor
Did he drop them?
She's too happy about it
[No, I am...]

[Almost full]
[She looks like a worker here now!]
[With a thankful heart for the subscribers ♥]
[Working hard with Tzuyang]
[Stacks on stacks]
I.. I.. I can't carry it
[Complete]
[I'm dying...]
We got a lot today I think the most ever
You did a good job
Good job everyone
[Finished]
She did a very good job today We're going to finish up here
To finish all 400 boxes to give out to her subscribers
Thank you!
[All the tomatoes that were picked]

[Go through multiple procedures]
[Right to our subscribers]
[Through meticulous handwork]
[Off to our subscribers!]
[Complete]
We have 1 more task to do
[What's behind these huge doors?]
Hello
[Mushrooms]
That's so cool
If we water them here, the spawns come up
They break apart
And the mushroom comes out like "boink"
[Boink!]
[Just like that :D]
I'm a fan!

Thank you!
I'm overjoyed
Just pick out the big ones
Just like this?
Okay, just the big mushrooms? Yes
I would've never thought that I would be working anywhere if it wasn't for here
I can earn money
And just like this...
I like that I get to meet people to work together
[In the zone]
The mushrooms are huge!!
[Almost looks like a pastry]
So huge!!
[Enourmous]
[Please take me!!]
[We're not at a bakery btw]

[A basket full of our subscribers' love]
[Mushroom POV]
Tzuyang picked out the most!
[True love for Tzuyang]
Tzuyang's subscribers, enjoy the mushroom and be healthy
We hope for 5 million soon!
Subscribe and like Tzuyang's channel please
[Finishing up mushroom work]
We're going to package up the tomatoes and mushrooms now
[Packaging]
[In a cute little box]
[And as the boxes are piling up]
[Finished]
[Now for the mushrooms]
I watch Tzuyang mukbang!
Really? Thank you!

10 packs of Ramyun noodles!!
It's 15 packs
Sometimes 10 packs, sometimes more
You eat a lot of those as well The beef small intestines
You've seen those as well?
You know a lot!
[The mushrooms go in a dryer]
Preparing the mushrooms take a lot of our efforts So please enjoy it and keep it up!
Tzuyang subscribers!
There are a lot of dietary fibers inside
So it's great for weight loss
You can look as pretty as Tzuyang if you consume it
Thank you
The mushrooms we picked out today will go through a 12~15 hour drying process and they will be delivered to the subscribers
Thank you
400 boxes are about 20,000,000 Won (~$17,500 USD)

To us, this 20,000,000 Won will be used for our people's pay and also to further keep this foundation together [If you would like to join the cause, contact (02-720-7002 or visit www.purme.org)] Email antharoni@gmail.com for more information
Thank you so much
Are you giving us that much money?
[Such a cute question]
Amazing!
20,000,000 Won!
I picked out the tomatoes and the mushrooms today
Thank you
I love you all ♥
https://forms.gle/iMbX3y8uRNDM35DXA [Go to the link and complete the form to be entered in a drawing of gifts (picking 400 winners)] [This event will end on August 5th at 12 midnight, so please keep that in mind!]
